meta.title: Emcan Group — Design · Build · Power · Control
meta.description: Emcan Group is a Saudi industrial group delivering engineered, built, powered, and digitally controlled industrial facilities across four specialised companies.

hero.lede: One integrated group for the full industrial lifecycle — from disciplined engineering and construction to reliable power and digital control.

group.intro: Emcan Group delivers integrated solutions for the process industry and beyond — engineering, construction, energy, and digital control under one structure. Backed by in-house capabilities across the Kingdom, we combine global best practice with deep local knowledge.

leadership.title: Our Leadership Team
leadership.lede: Experienced leaders driving innovation and excellence across Emcan Group.

chairman.name: Mohammed Bashawri
chairman.statement:
In an increasingly competitive environment marked by rising challenges and escalating resource costs, efficiency, optimization, and sustainability are no longer options — they are strategic imperatives. At Emcan, we do not approach projects as mere spaces, systems, or services. We view every project as a high-performance investment asset and a unique production engine, engineered with the full depth of our expertise and purpose-built to deliver measurable value.

Driven by experience and integrity, our projects are distinguished by superior quality, operational efficiency, and the integration of smart buildings and smart industrial solutions powered by Fourth Industrial Revolution technologies. They are sustainable, safe, and designed to generate strong, long-term economic returns. At Emcan, we do not limit ourselves to achieving what is possible — we are committed, Inshallah, to expanding boundaries and transforming the impossible into tangible, profitable realities.

rafei.name: Ammar Rafei
rafei.shortStatement: Results-driven engineering and project management executive with 18+ years of international experience in industrial engineering, automation, and large-scale project delivery across multiple sectors.
rafei.bio: Currently Managing Director at Emcan Consultants & Engineers, leading design and supervision services for industrial plants and mixed-use developments. Previously Design Manager at Khatib & Alami on the Jeddah Central Development, and over 12 years in project management at HUTA Marine.

amin.name: Haitham Amin
amin.shortStatement: Seasoned construction executive with over 22 years of experience in Saudi Arabia's construction sector, specializing in project delivery and executive leadership.
amin.bio: Holds a Master's Degree in Project Management and specializes in project delivery, business development, and executive leadership. Has a proven track record of successfully managing complex industrial and commercial projects across Saudi Arabia's construction sector, bringing more than two decades of hands-on delivery experience to every engagement.

alryati.name: Ramadan AlRyati
alryati.shortStatement: Executive leader in energy, infrastructure, and electrical manufacturing with over two decades of experience building and transforming businesses across the GCC and Europe.
alryati.bio: As General Manager – KSA, leads full-spectrum operations with end-to-end P&L accountability across power generation, EPC, district cooling, and MV/LV electrical product development. Specializes in scaling organizations, operational restructuring, and delivering high-value infrastructure programs that bridge engineering depth with executive strategy.

alfayoumi.name: Abdullah AlFayoumi
alfayoumi.shortStatement: Technology leader with over 18 years of experience spanning programming, teaching, project management, and executive leadership in the technology field.
alfayoumi.bio: Progressed from programming and teaching through project management to leading Rama Technology. Known for his leadership vision and commitment to emerging technologies, with particular interest in cybersecurity and technical infrastructure, and a strong ability to integrate technologies into effective, innovative solutions.

sustainability.description: Entry into renewable energy, district cooling, and energy storage projects, aligning with Saudi Arabia's sustainability drive.

iconic.title: Iconic Projects
iconic.description: Recognition through iconic industrial projects such as the Pepsi Mega Factory, food industry facilities, and pharmaceutical plants.

partnerships.description: Strategic partnership with Kingspan Group to introduce high-performance, sustainable building systems to the Kingdom.

multidisciplinary.title: Multidisciplinary Excellence
multidisciplinary.description: Expansion into advanced healthcare, logistics, and mega industrial projects, strengthening Emcan's multidisciplinary footprint.

today.title: Vision 2030 Partner
